name: Twice Baked Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 4 large potatoes or equivalent small ones
Frozen chives in a little plastic container
1/2 - 1 larger sized container of sour cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cube the potatoes.
2. Boil the potatoes until soft.
3. In a mixing bowl, add the cream cheese to the bottom.
4. Add the drained potatoes on top of the cream cheese.
5. Ensure the potatoes are hot and mix them in quickly with the cheese.
6. Stir in about half of the sour cream container.
7. Continue adding sour cream until the potatoes have the consistency of creamed potatoes.
8. Add chives until the potatoes look garnished.
9. Mix well and transfer to an oven-safe bowl.
10. Press down to remove air pockets and smooth the top.
11. Bake at 350-400°F (175-200°C) until the top begins to brown, about 15 minutes.
